title: Vežba 80

fillInTheBlank.sentence:
Linda and Jake discuss their design project experience. First, Linda suggests they do a BLANK to review what went well and what didn't. Jake admits to reviewing BLANK, though not always in BLANK.

Linda recalls a time when the whole team was BLANK, and Jake was addressing a BLANK that required immediate attention. Both agree that the project was a BLANK, teaching them the importance of integrating security into the design process.

blanks.feedback: To je revizija/evaluacija koja se sprovodi nakon projekta kako bi se razmotrili uspehi i izazovi.
Ovo su ranjivosti koje mogu izložiti sistem pretnjama.
To znači pratiti stvari kako se dešavaju, bez kašnjenja.
Radi se o dodjeljivanju dodatnih sati radi ispunjavanja zahtjeva projekta.
To je važan problem koji zahteva hitnu pažnju kako bi se izbegla opasnost.
Predstavlja vreme i napor potreban za posedovanje nečega novog.

instructions:
Ovo je pregled svih razgovora koje ste nedavno pročitali.

Napišite sledeću reč ili frazu na pravo mesto: major vulnerability, security vulnerabilities, real time, learning curve, working overtime, na quick post-mortem.
